changed_fields: repeat generation writes both runs to one canonical output pathname
retained canonical record is the second whole-file-identical run
observation_before_amendment: The first station's two CLI files differed only in the output pathname printed in the header because the determinism runs used different output paths. No year-feature, solver, certificate, selected path, or matrix result had been created or inspected.
reason: Whole-file repeat identity requires an identical effective output pathname because CLIGEN records that pathname in the CLI header.
